description_long: This is a modern two-story house featuring a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior combines dark and light color blocks, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, palm trees, and a covered patio area for outdoor dining. There is a visible garage, a water tank, and a small play area with a swing set, indicating family-friendly amenities. The upper floor has a large terrace with outdoor seating and a hot tub, while the ground floor opens directly to the pool and garden. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and extensive outdoor living spaces. The design features clean lines, a mix of dark and light exteriors, and family-friendly amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, sun loungers, patio, and large windows with the main living areas opening to the backyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, water tank, and upper terrace, with the pool and palm trees visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage entrance, water tank, and a small play area, with the terrace and upper windows above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upper terrace, flat roof, and the length of the backyard with the pool and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, and direct access from the driveway with minimal decorative elements.
